name: test-all-features
description: Covers HookEngine PreToolUse/PostToolUse phases, exact/star/regex matchers, command/webhook rule execution, timeout, and script skip behavior. Command rules append JSON lines to /tmp/agent-spaces-hook-test.log.

PreToolUse.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.appendFileSync('/tmp/agent-spaces-hook-test.log', JSON.stringify({hook:'pre-any-command', phase:process.env.HOOK_PHASE, workspaceId:process.env.HOOK_WORKSPACE_ID, toolName:process.env.HOOK_TOOL_NAME, input:JSON.parse(process.env.HOOK_TOOL_INPUT||'{}'), at:new Date().toISOString()})+'\n')"

node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.appendFileSync('/tmp/agent-spaces-hook-test.log', JSON.stringify({hook:'pre-exact-command', phase:process.env.HOOK_PHASE, toolName:process.env.HOOK_TOOL_NAME, input:JSON.parse(process.env.HOOK_TOOL_INPUT||'{}'), at:new Date().toISOString()})+'\n')"

node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.appendFileSync('/tmp/agent-spaces-hook-test.log', JSON.stringify({hook:'invalid-regex-fallback-command', phase:process.env.HOOK_PHASE, toolName:process.env.HOOK_TOOL_NAME, at:new Date().toISOString()})+'\n')"

PostToolUse.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.appendFileSync('/tmp/agent-spaces-hook-test.log', JSON.stringify({hook:'post-any-command', phase:process.env.HOOK_PHASE, workspaceId:process.env.HOOK_WORKSPACE_ID, toolName:process.env.HOOK_TOOL_NAME, result:JSON.parse(process.env.HOOK_TOOL_RESULT||'null'), at:new Date().toISOString()})+'\n')"
